top_insights: The smartest people ignore degrees; they master the specific skill the market actually pays for.
Nobody is coming to save you. Your rescue plan is the only one that exists.
True leverage comes from building when others are complaining about the broken system.
Never trash your partner publicly; it signals weakness and invites predators into your life.
Reach out to high-value people when you need nothing, not when you need something.
hook_patterns: Contrarian statements that challenge common beliefs or norms
Insight-driven reveals using specific data points or historical facts
Personal anecdotes framed as exclusive or 'never told before' stories
emotional_drivers: Validation of the reader's skepticism or alternative worldview
Desire for status and leverage signals through association with high-value figures
Relief from anxiety via clear, actionable takeaways or structured advice
emerging_narrative: A shift towards radical self-reliance and skepticism of established institutions, where success is framed as the result of individual insight, direct action, and bypassing traditional gatekeepers (education, media, healthcare).

viral_examples.author: Codie_Sanchez
viral_examples.text: I have a friend who used to work for 2 billionaires after all he's seen he said to me, "I wish you not one penny over $299 million. Reality gets completely lost somewhere after that." I think about that sometimes.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: Elon’s stance is principled. Trump’s stance is practical. Tech needs Republicans for the present. Republicans need Tech for the future. Drop the tax cuts, cut some pork, get the bill through.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: The smartest people are all self-taught, even if they went to school.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: Panic led to lockdowns. Lockdowns led to fiscal stimulus. Stimulus led to inflation. Inflation led to monetary tightening. Tightening leads to recession. The panic wasn’t free - and the bill is coming due.

viral_examples.author: thedankoe
viral_examples.text: Normalize not having an opinion on things you don’t understand.

winning_patterns: Contrarian statements that challenge common beliefs or norms
Insight-driven reveals using specific data points or historical facts
Personal anecdotes framed as exclusive or 'never told before' stories
